title: E-Commerce Product Description Writer
promptText: Write a compelling e-commerce product description for [PRODUCT_NAME], which is a [PRODUCT_TYPE] sold on [PLATFORM]. The target customer is [TARGET_AUDIENCE]. Include the following elements: a headline that grabs attention and includes the primary keyword, an opening hook that speaks to the customer's pain point or desire, 3-5 bullet points highlighting key features and their benefits (not just specs), a short paragraph building emotional connection or social proof, and a closing call-to-action. The tone should match the brand personality: [BRAND_TONE]. Optimize the description for SEO by naturally incorporating these keywords: [SEO_KEYWORDS]. Keep the total length between 150-300 words. Use sensory language and power words that drive conversions. Avoid cliches like 'game-changer' or 'revolutionary' unless truly warranted.
description: This prompt creates conversion-optimized product descriptions that go beyond listing specifications. It combines persuasive copywriting techniques with SEO best practices to produce descriptions that both rank in search and convince shoppers to click 'Add to Cart.' The structured format ensures every description includes the essential elements that drive sales: benefit-focused bullet points, emotional hooks, and clear calls to action. Whether you are launching a new product or rewriting hundreds of existing listings, this prompt maintains consistent quality while adapting to different brand voices and customer segments. Ideal for Shopify, Amazon, Etsy, and other e-commerce platforms.

variables.name: PRODUCT_TYPE
variables.example: lightweight neutral running shoe for daily training

variables.name: TARGET_AUDIENCE
variables.example: recreational runners aged 25-45 who run 15-30 miles per week

tips: Include specific numbers and measurements to build credibility
Paste in competitor descriptions so ChatGPT can differentiate your copy
Ask for A/B test variants of the headline to find the best performer
exampleOutput:
# CloudStep Pro Running Shoes — Lightweight Comfort for Every Mile

Tired of choosing between cushioning and speed? The CloudStep Pro gives you both.

- **Zero-Drop Responsive Foam** absorbs impact without slowing your stride, so your legs feel fresh at mile 20
- **Engineered Mesh Upper** keeps your feet cool and dry, even on humid summer runs
- **GripTech Outsole** delivers confident traction on wet pavement and light trails
- **Only 7.8 oz** — lighter than most daily trainers without sacrificing durability

Over 2,000 runners have made the CloudStep Pro their go-to training shoe. As one reviewer put it: "I forget I'm wearing them — in the best way."

**Ready to run lighter? Choose your size and hit the road.**
metaTitle: E-Commerce Product Description Writer Prompt for ChatGPT
metaDescription: Create conversion-optimized product descriptions for e-commerce with ChatGPT. SEO-friendly copy that sells.
